prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - 3000+ calories with carbohydrate loading for sustained endurance energy

solution_criteria: Plan contains exactly 6 meals distributed throughout the day
Total daily calories meet or exceed 3000 with emphasis on carbohydrates (55-65% of total)
Meals are compact and concise (brief descriptions, not lengthy recipes)
Includes appropriate timing and food choices for sustained energy in endurance training
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and sustained energy distribution across 6 small meals

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and strength while maintaining body composition for weightlifting competition

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks) with protein-focused meals around training windows
Macronutrient distribution supports strength/power athlete needs with elevated protein intake
Includes pre-training, intra-training (if applicable), and post-training nutrition strategy
Plan is compact and concise (suitable for quick daily reference)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing balanced macros with protein-focused meals around training windows and recovery nutrition

prompt_inputs.goal: High-energy performance meal plan for basketball game day

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers 1 full day with breakfast, lunch, pre-game meal, and post-game meal
All meals are 100% plant-based with complete protein sources (legumes, tofu, nuts, seeds, grains)
Estimated daily calories meet high-performance athlete needs (~3,000-3,500 kcal for 95kg athlete)
Includes timing and portion guidance suitable for basketball training and game performance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary constraint (vegan basketball player) requiring complete plant-based protein sources while meeting high energy demands for court performance
